description: Power BI Desktop is open on the Windows desktop. A CSV file named 'sales_data.csv' is available at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\PowerBITasks\sales_data.csv, containing sales transaction data with columns: Product_ID, Sale_Date, Sales_Rep, Region, Sales_Amount, Quantity_Sold, Product_Category, Unit_Cost, Unit_Price, Customer_Type, Discount, Payment_Method, Sales_Channel. Import this data and create a Clustered Bar Chart visualization showing the sum of Sales_Amount by Region. Save the report as C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\sales_report.pbix.
